title: VATIN Double Face Navy Blue Satin Ribbon 38mm Continuous 22m,Blue Polyester Fabric Ribbon use for Bows Bouquet, Gift Wrapping, Floral Arrangement Wedding Decoration
features: 【SIZE】 38mm wide ribbon, 22m continuous length per spool, without any splices, perfect for all your creative projects.
【MATERIAL】Made from 100% Polyester, this double-faced satin ribbon is durable and luxurious.
【HIGH QUALITY】Glossy finish on both sides, elegant shine, and easy to tie into beautiful bows. Washable, non-shrink, and colorfast, ideal for all crafting and sewing needs.

【WIDE RANGE OF USES】Perfect for hair bows, gift wrapping, ribbon crafts, party decorations, scrapbooking, bottle decorations, baking crafts, flower arrangements, and baby showers. Suitable for all types of crafting and sewing.
【VATIN COMMITMENT】VATIN is dedicated to providing high-quality products and services, making it a great choice for all your arts and crafts projects.
description: VATIN Navy Double Faced Polyester Satin Ribbon, 1-1/2” Wide, Continuous 25 Yards, Ideal for Bows, Bouquet, Gift Wrapping, Wedding, Floral Arrangements
